languages.text: "Хочу отдельно отметить, что благодаря вашей верности своим принципам, мастера Сектора Бионики смогли идеально отладить установку простейших имплантов. Операции проходят быстро и не требуют обезболивающих — прошу принять в дар кое-что, что поможет вам использовать их излишки в бою".

traits.locale_text: [драфт] "Хочу отдельно отметить, что благодаря вашей верности своим принципам, мастера Сектора Бионики смогли поставить производство особо важных имплантов на поток. Если вам когда-нибудь будет нужно повторить работу какого-то мастера... Мы можем попробовать сделать это на своих станках".

[драфт] "Хочу отдельно отметить, что благодаря вашей верности своим принципам, мастера Сектора Бионики смогли поставить производство особо важных имплантов на поток. Если вам когда-нибудь будет нужно повторить работу какого-то мастера... Мы можем попробовать сделать это на своих станках".

languages.text: "I would like to note that, thanks to your adherence to your principles, the experts of the Sector Bionica have been able to perfect the process of installing basic implants. The operations can now be completed in the shortest time and without having to expend any pain-dulling supplies — and so, I ask you to accept something that should ensure that the resulting surplus instead finds good use in the battles you face."
languages.original_text: "Хочу отдельно отметить, что благодаря вашей верности своим принципам, мастера Сектора Бионики смогли идеально отладить установку простейших имплантов. Операции проходят быстро и не требуют обезболивающих — прошу принять в дар кое-что, что поможет вам использовать их излишки в бою".

traits.locale_text: "I would like to note that, thanks to your adherence to your principles, the experts of the Sector Bionica have been able to perfect the process of installing basic implants. The operations can now be completed in the shortest time and without having to expend any pain-dulling supplies — and so, I ask you to accept something that should ensure that the resulting surplus instead finds good use in the battles you face."

"I would like to note that, thanks to your adherence to your principles, the experts of the Sector Bionica have been able to perfect the process of installing basic implants. The operations can now be completed in the shortest time and without having to expend any pain-dulling supplies — and so, I ask you to accept something that should ensure that the resulting surplus instead finds good use in the battles you face."

"I would like to note that, thanks to your adherence to your principles, the experts of the Sector Bionica have been able to perfect the process of installing basic implants. The operations can now be completed in the shortest time and without having to expend any pain-dulling supplies — and so, I ask you to accept something that should ensure that the resulting surplus instead finds good use in the battles you face."

"I would like to note that, thanks to your adherence to your principles, the experts of the Sector Bionica have been able to perfect the process of installing basic implants. The operations can now be completed in the shortest time and without having to expend any pain-dulling supplies — and so, I ask you to accept something that should ensure that the resulting surplus instead finds good use in the battles you face."

languages.text: "Ich möchte darauf hinweisen, dass die Experten des Sektors Bionica den Installationsprozess für Basisimplantate dank Eurer Prinzipientreue perfektionieren konnten. Die Operationen können nun in kürzester Zeit ohne die Verabreichung von Schmerzmitteln abgeschlossen werden ... ich bitte Euch daher, etwas anzunehmen, das sicherstellen sollte, dass der daraus resultierende Überschuss in Euren zukünftigen Schlachten Verwendung findet."
languages.original_text: "I would like to note that, thanks to your adherence to your principles, the experts of the Sector Bionica have been able to perfect the process of installing basic implants. The operations can now be completed in the shortest time and without having to expend any pain-dulling supplies — and so, I ask you to accept something that should ensure that the resulting surplus instead finds good use in the battles you face."

traits.locale_text: "Ich möchte darauf hinweisen, dass die Experten des Sektors Bionica den Installationsprozess für Basisimplantate dank Eurer Prinzipientreue perfektionieren konnten. Die Operationen können nun in kürzester Zeit ohne die Verabreichung von Schmerzmitteln abgeschlossen werden ... ich bitte Euch daher, etwas anzunehmen, das sicherstellen sollte, dass der daraus resultierende Überschuss in Euren zukünftigen Schlachten Verwendung findet."

languages.text: « J'aimerais remarquer que, grâce à vous, les experts du secteur Bionica ont réussi à perfectionner le processus de pose des implants basiques. Ces opérations peuvent désormais être réalisées plus rapidement et sans dépenses inutiles en analgésiques. Ainsi, il me semble que le surplus de fournitures qui en résulte devrait être utilisé à bon escient au cours de vos futures batailles. »
languages.original_text: "I would like to note that, thanks to your adherence to your principles, the experts of the Sector Bionica have been able to perfect the process of installing basic implants. The operations can now be completed in the shortest time and without having to expend any pain-dulling supplies — and so, I ask you to accept something that should ensure that the resulting surplus instead finds good use in the battles you face."

traits.locale_text: « J'aimerais remarquer que, grâce à vous, les experts du secteur Bionica ont réussi à perfectionner le processus de pose des implants basiques. Ces opérations peuvent désormais être réalisées plus rapidement et sans dépenses inutiles en analgésiques. Ainsi, il me semble que le surplus de fournitures qui en résulte devrait être utilisé à bon escient au cours de vos futures batailles. »

languages.text: “我想说的是，正因为您忠于自己的原则，仿生区的专家们才能完善基础植入物的安装流程。现在手术可以在最短时间内完成，而且无需消耗任何镇痛药剂——所以我请求您接受这些赠礼，好让省下来的物资，在您接下来的战斗中得到善用。”
languages.original_text: "I would like to note that, thanks to your adherence to your principles, the experts of the Sector Bionica have been able to perfect the process of installing basic implants. The operations can now be completed in the shortest time and without having to expend any pain-dulling supplies — and so, I ask you to accept something that should ensure that the resulting surplus instead finds good use in the battles you face."

traits.locale_text: “我想说的是，正因为您忠于自己的原则，仿生区的专家们才能完善基础植入物的安装流程。现在手术可以在最短时间内完成，而且无需消耗任何镇痛药剂——所以我请求您接受这些赠礼，好让省下来的物资，在您接下来的战斗中得到善用。”

languages.text: «Me gustaría hacer constar que, gracias a su firme seguimiento de sus principios, los expertos del Sector Bionica han podido dominar el proceso de instalar implantes básicos. Ahora se pueden completar las operaciones en el mínimo tiempo posible y sin necesidad de emplear suministros analgésicos, por lo que le ruego que acepte algo que dará buen uso al excedente resultante en sus batallas venideras».
languages.original_text: "I would like to note that, thanks to your adherence to your principles, the experts of the Sector Bionica have been able to perfect the process of installing basic implants. The operations can now be completed in the shortest time and without having to expend any pain-dulling supplies — and so, I ask you to accept something that should ensure that the resulting surplus instead finds good use in the battles you face."

traits.locale_text: «Me gustaría hacer constar que, gracias a su firme seguimiento de sus principios, los expertos del Sector Bionica han podido dominar el proceso de instalar implantes básicos. Ahora se pueden completar las operaciones en el mínimo tiempo posible y sin necesidad de emplear suministros analgésicos, por lo que le ruego que acepte algo que dará buen uso al excedente resultante en sus batallas venideras».

languages.text: 「あなた方の原則に対する忠誠心のおかげで、バイオニクス・セクターのマスターたちは、最も簡単なインプラントの取り付けを完璧なものにすることができました。手術は短時間で済み、麻酔も必要ありません。彼らの余剰を戦闘に役立てるために、何か寄付をお受け取りください。」
languages.original_text: "I would like to note that, thanks to your adherence to your principles, the experts of the Sector Bionica have been able to perfect the process of installing basic implants. The operations can now be completed in the shortest time and without having to expend any pain-dulling supplies — and so, I ask you to accept something that should ensure that the resulting surplus instead finds good use in the battles you face."

traits.locale_text: 「あなた方の原則に対する忠誠心のおかげで、バイオニクス・セクターのマスターたちは、最も簡単なインプラントの取り付けを完璧なものにすることができました。手術は短時間で済み、麻酔も必要ありません。彼らの余剰を戦闘に役立てるために、何か寄付をお受け取りください。」

languages.text: "İlkelerinize bağlılığınız sayesinde Sektör Biyonika uzmanlarının temel implantları takma sürecini mükemmelleştirebildiğini belirtmek isterim. Operasyonlar artık en kısa sürede ve ağrı kesici malzemeler harcamaya gerek kalmadan tamamlanabiliyor. Bu yüzden ortaya çıkan bu fazlalığın bunun yerine yüzleşeceğiniz savaşlarda iyi bir şekilde kullanılmasını sağlayacak bir şeyi kabul etmenizi rica ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "I would like to note that, thanks to your adherence to your principles, the experts of the Sector Bionica have been able to perfect the process of installing basic implants. The operations can now be completed in the shortest time and without having to expend any pain-dulling supplies — and so, I ask you to accept something that should ensure that the resulting surplus instead finds good use in the battles you face."

Operasyonlar artık en kısa sürede ve ağrı kesici malzemeler harcamaya gerek kalmadan tamamlanabiliyor. Bu yüzden ortaya çıkan bu fazlalığın bunun yerine yüzleşeceğiniz savaşlarda iyi bir şekilde kullanılmasını sağlayacak bir şeyi kabul etmenizi rica ediyorum."
